chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Permissible and Impermissible to Wear in the State of Ihram

text: 2642 - وَ سَأَلَهُ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مُسْلِمٍ : عَنِ اَلْمُحْرِمِ يَضَعُ عِصَامَ اَلْقِرْبَةِ عَلَى رَأْسِهِ إِذَا اِسْتَقَى فَقَالَ «نَعَمْ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2642 - Muhammad ibn Muslim asked Imam (as) about a Muhrim placing the strap of a water bag (qirbah) on his head while drawing water.
Imam (as) said: "Yes."
